Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course explicitly covers "能源戰略" (Energy strategy), which is fundamental to understanding energy policies and infrastructure, relevant to Targets 7.a and 7.b.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course covers "能源戰略" and "媒體與網路主權," which relate to energy and ICT infrastructure, linking to Targets 9.1 and 9.c.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Analysis of "權力菁英網絡" (Power elite network) and "中央與地方" (Central and local) relations infers a study of political and economic inclusion (Target 10.2).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: Discussion of "資源型經濟" (resource-based economy) and "能源戰略" (energy strategy) tangentially relates to the sustainable management of natural resources (Target 12.2).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course is fundamentally about the "俄烏戰爭" (Russo-Ukrainian War) and Russia's political institutions ("普欽政權"), directly addressing Targets 16.1 (reduce violence) and 16.6 (effective institutions).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Analyzing the "俄烏戰爭" and Russia's "政經發展" inherently involves international relations, connecting to global partnerships and macroeconomic stability (Targets 17.13, 17.16).
